description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style refrigerator with a bold red exterior adorned with white cherry blossom flower decals on all visible sides. The refrigerator features two separate compartments, each with its own protruding vertical handle, and a slightly weathered, rustic finish suggesting age and frequent use. On the upper door, there are small decorative items attached, including a photo and a metallic nameplate, adding a personal touch. A black electrical cord extends from the lower back, indicating its functionality, while the back panel also features a rectangular vent with horizontal slats. The top of the refrigerator has a pair of rusted, metallic blocks or objects placed on it, further enhancing its urban, lived-in character. The overall design is boxy and practical, suitable for placement in garages, workshops, or urban street settings.
description: A red, vintage refrigerator decorated with white cherry blossom decals, featuring two doors with vertical handles, a back vent, and a weathered, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing three white cherry blossom decals and the vertical handles, with the electrical cord visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both doors, vertical handles, decorative items on the upper door, and the cherry blossom decals prominently.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three white cherry blossom decals and a clear view of the door seams and handles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing three cherry blossom decals, a rectangular vent with horizontal slats at the bottom, and the electrical cord extending outward.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical handles, placed on the left edge of each door, simple and utilitarian.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular vent with horizontal slats located at the lower back panel.
